'''Slimego''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. Working with the [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Slizzik]] and the [[Taloron Hunters|Taloron Hunter]] [[Crutag]], Slimego pursued a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to the jungle world of [[Trinta]]. Both he and Slizzik were prepared to forgo a larger [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] and deliver the agents dead but Crutag insisted on capturing them alive. In the end, however, they were stranded on the planet by the self-exiled [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Halagad Ventor]] who used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to crash their [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and were defeated by their own quarry.
